code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let parts = string.split_whitespace(input)
let a = match string.parse_int(parts.get(0).ok_or(0)?) when Some(v) v when None 0 end
let b = match string.parse_int(parts.get(1).ok_or(0)?) when Some(v) v when None 0 end
let s = match string.parse_int(parts.get(2).ok_or(0)?) when Some(v) v when None 1 end

mut out = ""
mut cur = a
mut first = true
while cur < b
  if first
    out = "#{cur}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{cur}"
  end
  cur = cur + s
end
println(out)
